title: galium thunbergii
intro: Galium thunbergii, also known as Thunberg's bedstraw or Galium thunbergii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to China, Japan, and Korea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Galium thunbergii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support immune function. Galium thunbergii is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
